name: INTELLECT-3
archDisplay: MoE, post-trained via SFT + large-scale asynchronous RL on top of Zhipu's open GLM-4.5-Air-Base
note: Prime Intellect (decentralized/open RL training startup) post-trained this 106B/12B-active MoE on top of the openly-licensed GLM-4.5-Air-Base checkpoint, then open-sourced not just the weights but the full RL stack (PRIME-RL framework, verifiers library, 500+ agentic RL environments) under permissive licenses. Served via Prime Intellect's own chat.primeintellect.ai and Inference API; hosted pricing not publicly confirmed.

results.notes: GPQA Diamond [Corrected during full-corpus audit: The INTELLECT-3 Technical Report's own Table 2 ('Evaluations', Section 4) explicitly lists INTELLECT-3's GPQA Diamond score as 74.4, not 76.1. The existing 76.1 figure was sourced from Prime Intellect's blog post, whose only benchmark presentation is a bar chart (Figure 1 in the same report) without printed axis values — the precise, explicitly labeled Table 2 in the technical report is the more a]
Humanity's Last Exam, Table 2 of the INTELLECT-3 Technical Report.

verificationNotes: Cross-checked the INTELLECT-3 technical report (arXiv:2512.16144) against Prime Intellect's own blog post and the Hugging Face repo (PrimeIntellect/INTELLECT-3); benchmark numbers are vendor-reported in both the paper and blog.
